rulings.Case Title: MICKEY Y WONG VS. DORIS WONG et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Order Granting Leave To File 5th Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, March 18, 2014, Line 3: PLAINTIFF MICKEY WONG'S Motion For Order Granting Leave To File 5th Amended Complaint DENIED. Plaintiff has previously obtained a leave to amend when plaintiff changed counsel on May 30, 2013. Plaintiff failed to comply with CRC 3.1324(a)(2)&(3), CRC 3.1324(b)(3), CRC 3.1110 (e), and 3.1113(f). = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BAY RIDGE PROPERTIES LLC VS. AMERICAN BROKERS CONDUIT CORPORATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File Verified Complaint In Intervention For Quiet Title, Cancellation Of Instruments, And Violation Of California'S Unfair Competition Law, And For An Order Vacating Judgment Entered By This Court
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, March 18, 2014, Line 4: INTERVENOR WELLS FARGO, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION as Trustee for the Structured Asset Mortgage Investments II Trust 2007-AR4 Mortgage Pass-Through Certificates, Series 2007AR4 Trust, by and through Its Authorized Servicing Agent, Select Portfolio Servicing, Inc.'s Motion For Leave To File Verified Complaint In Intervention For Quiet Title, Cancellation Of Instruments, And Violation Of California'S Unfair Competition Law, And For An Order Vacating Judgment Entered By This Court GRANTED. Complaint in intervention shall be filed and served forthwith. No opposition filed. Prevailing party prepare order. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: THOMAS C.R. TAM VS. THOMAS W. TAM et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, March 18, 2014, Line 5: CROSS DEFENDANT THOMAS TAM'S MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT moot. First Amended Cross Complaint filed before Special Motion to Strike was before the Court. Salma v. Capon (2008) 161 Cal.App.4th 1275 and Simmons v. Allstate Ins. Co. (2001) 92 Cal.App.4th 1068 are distinguishable, i.e. anti-SLAPP motions were pending before the Court. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JESSICA JOHANNA SAINEZ VS. ILIANA OCAMPO et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, March 18, 2014, Line 6: DEFENDANTS ILIANA OCAMPO'S and NOHEMY MAYORA'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges unlawful detainer based on SFRO 37.9(a)(8) and is not so uncertain that named defendants cannot reasonably determine what issues must be admitted or denied, or what counts or claims are directed against them. Moving party and their counsel are ordered to comply with SFRO 2.6C in future. Order signed and filed in open court. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk B. Paredes, Not Reported. (501)
